name: provenance-overwritten-fix
title: Vouch force-overwritten targets in provenance
description: The 0.5.13 fleet refresh exposed a provenance bug shipped in 0.5.10: install_file returns status 'overwritten' for --force overwrites of drifted content, but provenance_content only vouches created/updated/unchanged, so single-pass refreshes kept stale hashes (audit drift failures on AMC/website worktrees) and force-overwritten files were silently unvouched since 0.5.11. Include 'overwritten' in the vouchable statuses; regression-test the tamper-then-force-refresh path; repair the two affected 0.5.13 refresh branches. install.py is not consumer-shipped, so no version bump (PR #15 precedent).
creator: sdelmas
